name: Malaysia Data.gov.my MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server providing seamless access to Malaysia's government open data portal (data.gov.my). Enables AI agents to query Malaysian government datasets including economic statistics, demographics, public services data, and government-published datasets — supporting research and analytics on Malaysian public data.
use_cases: Querying Malaysian economic and demographic statistics from research agents
Accessing government datasets for Malaysia market research from analytics agents
Building Malaysia-focused data analysis workflows using public government data
Researching public sector data for policy analysis and business intelligence agents
not_for: Real-time operational data (government open data is typically periodic)
best_when: A researcher, analyst, or business focused on Malaysia wants AI agents to access Malaysian government open data — enabling natural language queries over public statistics and datasets.
avoid_when: Your research focus is outside Malaysia. For other country open data, look for country-specific portals or use World Bank/UN data MCPs.

auth.notes: No auth required. data.gov.my is a public open data portal — datasets are publicly accessible.

pricing.notes: Free open source. data.gov.my is a free public portal.

performance.rate_limits: data.gov.my API rate limits may apply

known_agent_gotchas: data.gov.my API availability and rate limits depend on Malaysian government infrastructure
Dataset coverage and freshness varies — not all datasets are updated frequently
Community implementation — verify dataset availability for your specific data needs
data.gov.my uses a specific API format — agents need awareness of dataset structure
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public government open data — no sensitive data. No auth required. data.gov.my infrastructure reliability depends on Malaysian government systems.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public government data. No auth required. No sensitive data involved.
